title: Harris Essentials Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush Set, Pack of 5, 0.5in, 1in, 1.5in, 2in
features: The Essentials gloss paint brush set contains all the paint brushes you need for painting interior woodwork such as skirting boards and doors, in one handy set
The soft synthetic filament brush gives a good everyday finish when painting with gloss paints.
The comfortable handles are easy to grip, ideal for those long decorating sessions.
The different paint brush sizes means you can choose the right paint brush for the area you are painting.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials Woodwork Gloss 5 Paint Brush Pack Contents 1 x 0.5" Brush 1 x 1" Brush 1 x 1.5" Brush 2 x 2" Brush For painting interior woodwork All the paint brushes you need for painting those smaller interior woodwork areas. The pack features 4 different sized paint brushes ready for any painting task. The brushes give good paint pick up and finish when used with gloss paints. Doing a Painting Project? Don't forget to team your Essentials gloss paint brushes with the Essentials 4" Gloss & Emulsion Roller Set! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
